entries.quote: SuperCoins is evolving into a broader rewards layer across everyday use cases. Mobility is a natural extension, and this partnership with Uber allows us to integrate more seamlessly into how customers transact daily.
entries.signal: Flipkart is deliberately expanding SuperCoins from retail loyalty into a multi-vertical daily-life rewards coalition, with travel (Cleartrip) as a key redemption anchor.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes coalition loyalty — not a single-product card — is the winning model for India's next 100M digital consumers.

entries.quote: We do UPI not to solve the pure payment use case. We do UPI to build an interesting cross-financial services play where we are acquiring and retaining customers with the UPI.
entries.signal: UPI is explicitly subordinated to financial-services cross-sell — payments are a loss-leader funnel, credit and deposits are the P&L.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes scale in a zero-MDR payments market is only defensible if each acquired user is converted to a higher-margin credit or savings product within the same app.

entries.quote: Our idea is to bring a Klarna-style 'pay-in-three' model on top of commerce, creating a financial overlay that lets customers buy now and pay later within the Super.money ecosystem.
entries.signal: BNPL-on-commerce is the third monetisation leg beyond loans and cards, leveraging Flipkart's retail inventory directly.
entries.belief: [Inferred · Medium] Leadership believes the Flipkart commerce relationship is an underutilised asset that can become a standalone revenue stream once the credit infrastructure matures.
